_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assess, recommend, and evaluate remediation actions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating model validation findings and remediation plans, assessing whether identified model limitations are acceptable given the model's use case, materiality, and the organization's risk appetite.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.539), RC-T-003 (RC, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.572). Shared vocabulary: [remediation]. DCWF-only terms [actions, assess, evaluate, recommend] vs WIDAI-only terms [acceptable, appetite, assessing, case, evaluating, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.916, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assess, recommend, and evaluate remediation actions." and "Skill in evaluating model validation findings and remediation plans, assessing w" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.549 ≈ STS 0.572 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [remediation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [remediation]. DCWF-only: [actions, assess, evaluate, recommend]. WIDAI-only: [acceptable, appetite, assessing, case, evaluating, findings].
